title: Purple Vanilla GUI
description: purple pack vanilla is a pack which has purple gui
body:
# 💜 Purple Vanilla GUI

## A clean Vanilla-style GUI recolor in purple

Purple Vanilla GUI is a simple and lightweight **resource pack** that recolors Minecraft’s user interface into a **purple theme**, while keeping the original **Vanilla look and readability**.

The pack focuses only on the **GUI elements**, so the game still feels 100% vanilla — just with a fresh, modern purple style.

---

## ✨ Features

- Purple-themed GUI (menus, buttons, bars, icons)
- Vanilla-style colors and contrasts
- Clean and minimal look
- No gameplay changes
- Works in **all game modes**

---

## 🎮 Compatibility

- Minecraft **1.20 – Latest**
- Works with Vanilla & Vanilla+ setups

---

## 🎨 Design Philosophy

Purple Vanilla GUI is designed to:
- Stay true to Minecraft’s original UI
- Avoid over-saturation or eye strain
- Look good in both **dark** and **bright** environments

Perfect for players who want a subtle but stylish UI upgrade.

---

## ℹ️ Notes

This resource pack only changes the **visual appearance of the GUI**.  
It does **not** affect textures, blocks, items, or gameplay mechanics.

Feedback and suggestions are always welcome 💜
